criteriaResults.criterion: index.html exists with proper HTML5 doctype and structure
criteriaResults.evidence: File exists with <!DOCTYPE html>, proper head and body structure

criteriaResults.criterion: Semantic HTML elements: header, main, form, ul, li
criteriaResults.evidence: All semantic elements present and correctly used

criteriaResults.criterion: Input field with aria-label='New todo text' and placeholder
criteriaResults.evidence: Input has aria-label='New todo text' and placeholder='Add a new todo...'

criteriaResults.criterion: Add button with type='submit' and aria-label='Add todo'
criteriaResults.evidence: Button has type='submit' and aria-label='Add todo'

criteriaResults.criterion: Todo list container with role='list' and aria-label='Todo items'
criteriaResults.evidence: UL has role='list' and aria-label='Todo items'

criteriaResults.criterion: Empty state message visible when no todos
criteriaResults.evidence: Empty state displays 'No todos yet' message

criteriaResults.criterion: CSS uses custom properties for colors and spacing
criteriaResults.evidence: :root defines --color-* and --space-* custom properties used throughout

criteriaResults.criterion: Mobile-first responsive design with proper breakpoints
criteriaResults.evidence: Breakpoints at 480px and 768px with mobile-first approach

criteriaResults.criterion: Clean, modern styling with generous whitespace
criteriaResults.evidence: Modern design with shadows, rounded corners, system fonts, generous spacing

criteriaResults.criterion: Visible focus indicators for keyboard navigation
criteriaResults.evidence: Focus-visible styles with box-shadow and outline for all interactive elements
Directory exists with config, spec, and package.json files
Config supports 5 browsers with proper baseURL and reporting

criteriaResults.criterion: Initial E2E test file skeleton at tests/e2e/todo.spec.js
criteriaResults.evidence: 14 comprehensive tests covering all core functionality

handoff.handoffNotes: All acceptance criteria verified and passing. Task 1 implementation is complete with comprehensive E2E test coverage (70 tests passing across 5 browsers).
